name: Holoride
description: In-vehicle XR platform (Audi spinoff); SDK for location-synced immersive content.

seo.title: Holoride — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Holoride: In-vehicle XR platform (Audi spinoff); SDK for location-synced immersive content.

when_to_use: Location-synced XR content delivery in moving vehicles
In-car entertainment apps adapting to GPS route and dynamics
Augmented reality experiences using vehicle motion data
SDK for developers building location-adaptive in-vehicle apps
Spatial computing tied to real-world vehicle telemetry

pros: Unique niche for in-vehicle XR content
Synchronizes motion data to reduce motion sickness
SDK opens platform to content creators
cons: Market adoption of in-car VR unproven
review.verdict: Cool concept, fragile business; proceed with caution given the 2024 insolvency filing.
review.best_for: Experimental content studios exploring automotive XR
review.not_for: Production apps needing stable long-term platform

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
